query:
-- 1. Overall contact trust tier distribution
SELECT 
  trustTier,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct
FROM contacts
GROUP BY trustTier
ORDER BY count DESC;
